title: Clair de Lune Star Fleece Baby Wrap Blanket (0-6 Months) - Cream
seller_info_text: Sold by Amazon Resale and Fulfilled by Amazon.
features: ALL SEASON PRAM SUIT: No need for lots of layered blankets as the super-soft Star Fleece Baby Wrap Blanket keeps them warm and snug in cold weather, the lightweight design is extra comfortable for babies.
EFFORTLESS TRAVEL: The Clair de Lune Star Fleece Baby Wrap is perfect for effortless travel. No buttons or zips, it quickly and simply slips on which is always a bonus when you're a busy parent.
SUPER-SOFT FABRIC: Made from huggable soft fabric, crafted in SEDEX certified factories. The Baby Wrap Blanket is free from harmful substances and gentle next to your baby's delicate skin.

GENEROUS SIZE: Suitable for 0-6 months. The Star Fleece Wrap Blanket is generously sized, so it's ideal for babies in a Pavlik harness too. Please note it’s not recommended to use it as a night time sleep suit.

STYLISH TRAVEL ESSENTIAL: Available in Cream, Oatmeal and White and in 2 sizes. It's lightweight and compact to keep in the changing bag and the unisex neutral tones complement any outfit beautifully.
description: Wrap your baby in warmth and comfort with the Clair de Lune Star Fleece Baby Wrap Blanket. Crafted from plush fleece, this versatile blanket is perfect for outings in the pram or sling, offering snug comfort while you're on the move. Its charming star design features an integrated tassel hood and integrated mittens which add a playful touch to any adventure. Lightweight and easy to pack into your changing bag, it's the ideal travel blanket to replace your pram suit. Elevate your newborn essentials with this practical and stylish baby blanket, designed for comfort and convenience. Available in 2 sizes and 3 neutral colour options.
